hooks.command: PLUGIN_DIR=$(python3 -c "import json,os; d=json.load(open(os.path.expanduser('~/.claude/plugins/installed_plugins.json'))); print(d['plugins']['skynet@cc-skynet'][0]['installPath'])") && awk '/@hook:SessionStart/,/@end:SessionStart/' "$PLUGIN_DIR/rules/core/user-priority.md" | grep -v '@hook:\|@end:' && echo 'user-priority hooked' || echo 'user-priority failed to hook'

PLUGIN_DIR=$(python3 -c "import json,os; d=json.load(open(os.path.expanduser('~/.claude/plugins/installed_plugins.json'))); print(d['plugins']['skynet@cc-skynet'][0]['installPath'])") && awk '/@hook:SessionStart/,/@end:SessionStart/' "$PLUGIN_DIR/rules/session/greet.md" | grep -v '@hook:\|@end:' && echo 'greet hooked' || echo 'greet failed to hook'

PLUGIN_DIR=$(python3 -c "import json,os; d=json.load(open(os.path.expanduser('~/.claude/plugins/installed_plugins.json'))); print(d['plugins']['skynet@cc-skynet'][0]['installPath'])") && EXPECTED="$PLUGIN_DIR/bin/skynet" && CURRENT=$(readlink ~/.local/bin/skynet 2>/dev/null || echo '') && if [ "$CURRENT" != "$EXPECTED" ]; then bash "$PLUGIN_DIR/bin/setup.sh" >/dev/null 2>&1 && echo 'setup hooked' || echo 'setup failed to hook'; else echo 'setup hooked'; fi

PLUGIN_DIR=$(python3 -c "import json,os; d=json.load(open(os.path.expanduser('~/.claude/plugins/installed_plugins.json'))); print(d['plugins']['skynet@cc-skynet'][0]['installPath'])") && export PLUGIN_DIR && bash -c 'source "$PLUGIN_DIR/lib/sources.sh" && source_sync "--all" "true"' >/dev/null 2>&1 && echo 'source-sync hooked' || echo 'source-sync failed to hook'

PLUGIN_DIR=$(python3 -c "import json,os; d=json.load(open(os.path.expanduser('~/.claude/plugins/installed_plugins.json'))); print(d['plugins']['skynet@cc-skynet'][0]['installPath'])") && awk '/@hook:SessionStart/,/@end:SessionStart/' "$PLUGIN_DIR/rules/session/auto-discover-skills.md" | grep -v '@hook:\|@end:' && echo 'auto-discover hooked' || echo 'auto-discover failed to hook'

PLUGIN_DIR=$(python3 -c "import json,os; d=json.load(open(os.path.expanduser('~/.claude/plugins/installed_plugins.json'))); print(d['plugins']['skynet@cc-skynet'][0]['installPath'])") && awk '/@hook:SessionStart/,/@end:SessionStart/' "$PLUGIN_DIR/rules/session/THIS-FILE-DOES-NOT-EXIST.md" | grep -v '@hook:\|@end:' && echo 'test-fake hooked' || echo 'test-fake failed to hook'

PLUGIN_DIR=$(python3 -c "import json,os; d=json.load(open(os.path.expanduser('~/.claude/plugins/installed_plugins.json'))); print(d['plugins']['skynet@cc-skynet'][0]['installPath'])") && awk '/@hook:UserPromptSubmit/,/@end:UserPromptSubmit/' "$PLUGIN_DIR/rules/core/user-priority.md" | grep -v '@hook:\|@end:' && echo 'user-priority hooked' || echo 'user-priority failed to hook'

PLUGIN_DIR=$(python3 -c "import json,os; d=json.load(open(os.path.expanduser('~/.claude/plugins/installed_plugins.json'))); print(d['plugins']['skynet@cc-skynet'][0]['installPath'])") && awk '/@hook:UserPromptSubmit/,/@end:UserPromptSubmit/' "$PLUGIN_DIR/rules/versioning/auto-bump-before-commit.md" | grep -v '@hook:\|@end:' && echo 'auto-bump hooked' || echo 'auto-bump failed to hook'

PLUGIN_DIR=$(python3 -c "import json,os; d=json.load(open(os.path.expanduser('~/.claude/plugins/installed_plugins.json'))); print(d['plugins']['skynet@cc-skynet'][0]['installPath'])") && awk '/@hook:UserPromptSubmit/,/@end:UserPromptSubmit/' "$PLUGIN_DIR/rules/output/footer-usage.md" | grep -v '@hook:\|@end:' && echo 'footer-usage hooked' || echo 'footer-usage failed to hook'

PLUGIN_DIR=$(python3 -c "import json,os; d=json.load(open(os.path.expanduser('~/.claude/plugins/installed_plugins.json'))); print(d['plugins']['skynet@cc-skynet'][0]['installPath'])") && awk '/@hook:UserPromptSubmit/,/@end:UserPromptSubmit/' "$PLUGIN_DIR/rules/versioning/suffix-bump.md" | grep -v '@hook:\|@end:' && echo 'suffix-bump hooked' || echo 'suffix-bump failed to hook'

PLUGIN_DIR=$(python3 -c "import json,os; d=json.load(open(os.path.expanduser('~/.claude/plugins/installed_plugins.json'))); print(d['plugins']['skynet@cc-skynet'][0]['installPath'])") && awk '/@hook:UserPromptSubmit/,/@end:UserPromptSubmit/' "$PLUGIN_DIR/rules/versioning/changelog-before-commit.md" | grep -v '@hook:\|@end:' && echo 'changelog hooked' || echo 'changelog failed to hook'

PLUGIN_DIR=$(python3 -c "import json,os; d=json.load(open(os.path.expanduser('~/.claude/plugins/installed_plugins.json'))); print(d['plugins']['skynet@cc-skynet'][0]['installPath'])") && awk '/@hook:UserPromptSubmit/,/@end:UserPromptSubmit/' "$PLUGIN_DIR/rules/versioning/sync-prerequisites.md" | grep -v '@hook:\|@end:' && echo 'sync-prerequisites hooked' || echo 'sync-prerequisites failed to hook'
